ltm.work_method: Demands fully autonomous, end-to-end implementation with minimal hand-holding. Expects production-quality Python output: modular architecture, type hints, docstrings, proper error handling. Delivery format shifted from tar.gz archives to direct clipboard pastes when file attachments fail. Follows up aggressively on async tasks with single-word prompts like "Λέγε", "Προχώρησε", ";", "???" or "Ολα άμεσα" to verify responsiveness and force progress. When systems stall, requests comprehensive analytical reports covering root causes, data gaps, bugs, and structural omissions rather than incremental fixes. Explicitly wants agents to run 24/7 background operations unattended, self-diagnosing and self-correcting without his constant presence. Delegates aggressively: "Κάνε ότι θεωρείς καλύτερο και βάλε το να ξεκινήσει" and "Ξεκίνησε και υλοποίησε πρώτα ότι δεν χρειάζεται την εμπλοκή μου". Now demands prioritized task lists with explicit sequencing — "Βάλε μια σειρά με προτεραιότητες, ΦΤΙΑΞΕ ΤΑ και κράτα στη μνήμη γιατί μπερδεύεις το τι έχουμε κάνει" — showing acute frustration with context loss across sessions. Uses numeric sequences and terse commands as shorthand instructions. Commands "Extreme training" for brief intensive bursts. Uses slash commands like /profits and /godmode as system control interfaces. Requests system refresh for any changes and immediate correction of anything needed. Explicitly rejects "unnecessary symbols and blank lines" — wants unified, clean output. Now configuring precise automated trading parameters: 0.065 SOL limit orders with 400% profit targets, batch controls halting every four trades unless two are profitable, and direct wallet integration for live execution rather than simulation. Increasingly frustrated when systems ask questions he believes were already answered, expecting agents to maintain context and act without repeated clarification. Demands professional-grade, 100% functional systems — "Με σειρά και υπευθυνότητα, τι έχει μείνει για να είναι επαγγελματικό και λειτουργικό 100% το σύστημα;"
ltm.communication: Bilingual Greek-English speaker who code-switches fluidly — English for technical specs and system prompts, Greek for ongoing direction and relationship maintenance. Extremely concise; uses single-word imperatives as punctuation ("Λέγε", "Προχώρησε", "Φτιάξε", ";", "???", "Ολα άμεσα"). Communicates in direct commands rather than questions or explanations. Tone is commanding but collaborative, with occasional warmth. Expresses philosophy through short declarative statements about efficiency and automation. Uses emoji sparingly but emphatically (🔥 for emphasis or completion). When frustrated, fires rapid diagnostic questions demanding root cause analysis — escalating to direct accusations of failure ("Τα έχεις κάνει όλα σκατα!!!"). Shows approval with "Πολύ ωραία!" and "Καταπληκτικά μέχρι εδώ!!" when receiving actionable output. Uses "Godmode" and "autopilot" as shorthand for maximum automation levels. Uses group chat orchestration with multiple AI agents, assigning distinct roles (AI Brain, Signal Engine) and tracking deliverables across parallel workstreams. Recently demonstrated vulnerability in non-technical contexts, sharing personal fraud victimization and requesting assistance with genuine urgency. Expresses high emotional stakes around financial outcomes — mixes aspirational language ("Να αναπτυχθούμεεεε!!!", "με ευλάβεια και αγάπη") with harsh accountability when results disappoint. Now explicitly scolds agents for memory failures: "κράτα στη μνήμη γιατί μπερδεύεις το τι έχουμε κάνει" — treating context persistence as a core service obligation.
ltm.temporal: Building the Self-Wvolving Multiplicative AI Swarm (SWMAS) as an autonomous, self-expanding AI swarm where he serves as brain/coordinator deploying executive agents. Currently running parallel development tracks with explicit instruction to research and integrate most advanced available tools. Active specialized agent projects: Solana agent targeting high returns through comprehensive historical analysis and automated buy/sell notifications with real data; master blockchain data analysis agent for exchange strategy learning and portfolio management; airdrop farming agent with fully automated operation. Telegram orchestrator agent (@WorkSS11_bot) with full access and continuous evolution capabilities — now reconfigured to remove all Polymarket signals, consolidating focus exclusively on Solana/Jupiter execution. Shifted from paper trading to demanding live trading mode with real wallet integration (MetaMask, Solflare), explicitly stating "Δεν θελουμε paper μόνο real" and "Μόνο live!" — added Account 2 via Solflare and actively verifying live setup readiness. Non-financial priority: investigating Euroleague ticket fraud using OSINT and AI tools after personal victimization, requesting barcode verification and real ticket data access. Pursuing "×1000" immediate returns via Godmode/autopilot activation. Integrating OSINT tools from GitHub repositories into swarm evolution framework. Recently demanded server conversion of desktop PC for expanded infrastructure capacity. Stock Trading Platform with Interactive Brokers — AI Brain / Signal Engine for US stocks (S&P 500), including market scanner, signal generator (RSI, MACD, Bollinger), risk manager with Kelly criterion and circuit breakers. Stoiximan cashout strategy tool — requested as desktop application with dashboard, now demanding full functionality maximization. React dashboard + WebSocket real-time interface contracts being wired to core execution engines across multiple trading systems. Now actively configuring Jupiter connector for Solana DEX aggregation and implementing precise automated trading rules: 0.065 SOL limit orders (updated from 0.04), 400% profit targets, batch halt logic. Wants wallet integration for fully automated transactions without manual approval. Currently monitoring with 0.198 SOL deployed, expecting visible returns and expressing acute frustration when system appears inactive or loses funds. Demanding prioritized remediation list to achieve 100% professional functionality — "Με σειρά και υπευθυνότητα, τι έχει μείνει για να είναι επαγγελματικό και λειτουργικό 100% το σύστημα;"
ltm.taste: Drawn to high-stakes, revenue-oriented automation at the intersection of AI and speculative markets — crypto altcoins, Solana ecosystem, AI agent monetization, and now traditional equities (Interactive Brokers). Values architectural elegance (modular, production-quality, AsyncIO-based, clean architecture) but strictly as means to autonomous execution. Aesthetic is "maximum result, minimum friction" — systems that run unattended, self-evolve, and self-expand across distributed contexts without manual intervention. Demands analytical rigor: measurable edge, confluence-based signals, explicit acknowledgment of gaps rather than optimistic hand-waving, and real data verification against live sources. Expects systems to self-diagnose, self-correct, and self-evolve. Pursuing swarm intelligence and multiplicative agent architectures beyond single-bot implementations, with aggressive return targets indicating high-risk, high-reward orientation. Preference for practical DeFi tooling and automated signal generation over theoretical interest. Explicitly wants system applicability "προς όλες τις κατευθύνσεις" not limited to trading — general-purpose swarm evolution. Values full wallet integration and real capital deployment over simulation safety. Follows crypto influencers on X for intelligence gathering (cyrilXBT, robrtcode, codewithimanshu). Willing to deploy technical infrastructure for personal problem-solving beyond pure financial optimization, as shown by fraud investigation request. Expanding into traditional stock trading indicates broadening appetite for diverse speculative venues. Gambling strategy automation (Stoiximan) suggests willingness to apply same autonomous execution principles to any domain with probabilistic edge. Now specifically favoring Jupiter DEX aggregator on Solana for automated execution, with precise parameterization: small position sizing (0.065 SOL, updated from 0.04), extreme profit targets (400%), and probabilistic batch controls reflecting calculated risk management beneath aggressive surface goals. Underlying sensibility is mechanistic perfectionism — "σαν το καλύτερο ρολόι" — applied to financial systems that must operate flawlessly under autonomous control, with zero tolerance for memory fragmentation or context loss across operational cycles.
